name: lark-search
title: Lark Search
description: Search Feishu/Lark docs, messages, chats, and contacts from Raycast.
author: jyufu_ko

commands.name: search-lark
commands.title: Lark Search
commands.subtitle: Lark
commands.description: Search Feishu/Lark docs, messages, chats, and contacts from Raycast.

commands.name: sync-quicklinks
commands.title: Export Lark Quicklinks
commands.subtitle: Lark
commands.description: Export recently opened Lark results as Raycast Quicklinks JSON.

commands.name: refresh-hot-index
commands.title: Refresh Lark Hot Index
commands.subtitle: Lark
commands.description: Refresh Script Commands hot index for Lark root search.

commands.name: setup-hot-index
commands.title: Setup Lark Hot Index
commands.subtitle: Lark
commands.description: Initialize Lark Script Commands hot index and show setup instructions.

preferences.name: quicklinkLimit
preferences.title: Quicklink Export Limit
preferences.description: Maximum number of recently opened items to export as Quicklinks.

preferences.name: enableLarkApplication
preferences.title: Lark Application
preferences.description: Enable Lark as a desktop app target for opening chats, contacts, and messages.
preferences.label: Use Lark

preferences.name: larkApplicationName
preferences.title: Lark App
preferences.description: Lark application used for Raycast Quicklinks.

preferences.name: larkBundleId
preferences.title: Lark Bundle ID
preferences.description: Bundle identifier used to open Lark links directly in the desktop app.

preferences.name: larkCliIdentity
preferences.title: Lark lark-cli Identity
preferences.description: lark-cli identity passed to --as when Lark is the selected target.

preferences.name: enableFeishuApplication
preferences.title: Feishu Application
preferences.description: Enable Feishu as a desktop app target for opening chats, contacts, and messages.
preferences.label: Use Feishu

preferences.name: feishuApplicationName
preferences.title: Feishu App
preferences.description: Feishu application used for Raycast Quicklinks.

preferences.name: feishuBundleId
preferences.title: Feishu Bundle ID
preferences.description: Bundle identifier used to open Feishu links directly in the desktop app.

preferences.name: feishuCliIdentity
preferences.title: Feishu lark-cli Identity
preferences.description: lark-cli identity passed to --as when Feishu is the selected target.

preferences.name: hotIndexLimit
preferences.title: Hot Index Limit
preferences.description: Maximum number of Script Commands generated for Raycast root search.

preferences.name: hotIndexDirectory
preferences.title: Hot Index Script Commands Directory
preferences.description: Folder containing generated Lark Script Commands. Add this folder to Raycast Script Commands once.
